calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Denied

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To May-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ms. Andrea Routsi RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF Self-Represented Litigant.
Mr. Guadalupe Gamino for APPELLANT/DEFENDANT Mr. Patrick O'Sullivan, who is present.

The Cause comes on regularly for a Trial de Novo.

Ms. Andrea Routsi is affirmed and examined by the Court.

Mr. Guadalupe Gamino cross-examines the witness. The following exhibits are marked for IDENTIFICATION:
Defendant's Exhibit A - 3 Page Letter
Defendant's Exhbit B - Pictures (Group Exhibit)
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement

The witness is excused from further testimony.

Mr. Patrick O'Sullivan is affirmed and examined by Mr. Gamino.
Ms. Andrea Routsi cross-examines the witness.

The witness is excused from further testimony.

At the conclusion of this trial, the Court deems this matter submitted.

Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (624)

Off Calendar May-17-2012 Set For Trial On May-17-12 At 09:20 A.M. In Dept 624

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Judgment Entered
